rationale: Cached the parsed PostCSS root so cssRuleBlock and matching helpers no longer parse the full Mission Control stylesheet on every lookup.
Expanded token-first color assertions to cover shorthand border, outline, and box-shadow declarations.
Top-level bot review summary; its actionable inline comments are tracked separately in this ledger.
Top-level automated review wrapper with no separate actionable request.
Normalized resolved paths to forward slashes before regex assertions so the boundary test is separator-agnostic.
Added cssRuleBlocks and updated token-first validation to check every matching rule block for each semantic selector.
